item.title: See the Olympic medal count for the 2026 Winter Games
item.description: Here is a look at where the medal count stands for Team USA and other nations as the competition heats up at the 2026 Winter Olympics.

item.title: U.S. hockey captain Hilary Knight's hopes for her final Olympics
item.description: "CBS Saturday Morning" caught up with U.S. hockey captain Hilary Knight who shared her hopes for her final Winter Games.

item.title: Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson on inspiring the next generation
item.description: Supreme Court Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson was confirmed in 2022, and now she's hoping her story can inspire the next generation, sharing her experie...

item.title: Exclusive discounts from CBS Mornings Deals
item.description: On this edition of CBS Mornings Deals, we show you items that might just become essentials in your everyday life. Visit cbsdeals.com to take advantage...

item.title: An Olympic love story fit for Valentine's Day
item.description: U.S. downhill skier and gold medalist Breezy Johnson got engaged to her boyfriend Connor Watkins after he got down on one knee at the finish line of h...
